items.description: Vehicle recovery/follow up on I-80 eastbound between 1.7 miles west of Exit 101: PA 255 - DUBOIS/PENFIELD and .4 miles west of Exit 101: PA 255 - DUBOIS/PENFIELD. There is a lane restriction.
